data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"21:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nAll on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.\\nDo not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.\\nRole: cover.\\nImage grammar: hook_cover.\\nPurpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..\\nDiagram type: stage_evolution.\\nConcept summary: 这次更新给 Claude Code 和 CodeX 多了一个消息入口，更关键的是把配置动作压到了“自动开网页、扫码即可”。当远程连接从折腾配置变成扫码绑定，试用门槛会明显下降，但它依然更适合轻量协作和即时触发，不适合承接高风险代码操作。.\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room, three-stage timeline with transition emphasis, visual momentum from old frame to new frame.\\nKey relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.\\nLayout pattern: timeline_stage_transition.\\nDiagram focus: time-shift and logic-shift, not feature listing.\\nText position: right.\\nText budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.\\nHeadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.\\nSubheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.\\nLabel budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.\\nLabel count budget: <= 4 labels.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"微信接入不算小修小补，Cla\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"这次更新给 Claude C\\\".\\nGrammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.\\nAdditional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: op7418 Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent. Style profile….\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\\nDo not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
